title: VitaHealth Ginkgo 2000mg[EXP 07-2027] - Blood Circulation, Brain, Memory, Vegetarian
detail_text: VitaHealth Ginkgo 2000mg is formulated with 2000mg of ginkgo leaf extract, providing ginkgo flavone glycosides and terpene lactones. Equivalent to 40mg Ginkgo extract Improves blood circulation Supports brain health & memory Description Ginkgo biloba, commonly known as ginkgo, is one of the oldest living trees on Earth. It has been widely used in traditional Chinese medicine to naturally enhance blood flow and support overall circulatory health. Ginkgo provides two key active constituents: flavonoids and terpenoids. These compounds offer strong antioxidant support, helping to protect brain and body cells from damage caused by harmful free radicals. Ginkgo biloba supports brain function by improving blood flow to the brain, which may help enhance mental clarity, concentration, and overall cognitive performance. It is often used to help maintain memory and focus, especially in older adults or those experiencing age-related cognitive decline. Recommended for individuals who suffer from poor blood circulation and for people who frequently experience cold hands and feet. Directions Adults – Take 1 tablet, once daily, after a meal or as directed by a healthcare professional. Ingredients Each tablet contains: Extractum Ginkgo Siccus 40mg Equivalent to Ginkgo Biloba Leaf 2000mg

title: Ginseng + Ginkgo biloba supplement - improves circulation to the brain, improves memory and learning abilities
detail_text: Big tea ginseng and ginkgo biloba supplements support focus, memory, cognitive abilities and health, and blood circulation. It can also aid physical health and support us in coping with the stress we experience. Ginseng, also known as Korean ginseng, has been used as a medicinal plant in China, Korea and other countries for centuries, as has ginkgo. Each plant requires careful cultivation and careful harvesting to reach its full potential: Ginkgo can survive for hundreds of years as long as its leaves are harvested regularly, while ginseng requires more patience as these mountain-growing roots require 4- It takes 6 years to reach full strength. Daitea respects the essence of plants and delivers quality without compromising efficacy. This blend of ginseng and ginkgo is designed into capsules, drawing on traditional practices to create a supplement that can easily be incorporated into your daily routine. With this reliable, science-based supplement, you can reap the benefits of this traditional remedy without compromising your lifestyle .

Product Description:

FOCUS FUEL chewable tablets are formulated with our patented bacopa extract, Bacozest. Bacopa monnieri has been used in traditional Ayurvedic system of medicine since ancient times for cognitive, anti-inflammatory and stress relief benefits. Bacozest used Hydroplex Technology to provide a pleasant taste, making it an excellent product for children. Bacopa has been clinically studied to help improve memory, mood, clarity, and focus! These delicious chocolate tablets are great for children who need that extra boost of focus, mental clarity, and mood booster.

About the Ingredients: BacoZest Bacopa

BacoZest is scientifically developed, standardized extract, formulated with“Hydroplex Technology” to provide pleasant taste. BacoZest contains full spectrum bioactives from

Bacopa monnieri maintaining all the beneits supporting memory, clarity, focus, mood, and energy.

Top Reasons to Supplement with Focus Fuel

- Bacopa in clinical studies have been shown to promote a positive mood & reduce stress*

- Studies have shown that Bacopa helps increase focus*

- Studies have shown that taking bacopa can help significantly improve spatial memory, the ability to recall information.*

- Bacopa may help improve mental clarity*

Supplement Facts:

DIRECTIONS: For children 7-12, take 2 tablets in the morning and 2 in the evening along with food. For adults, take 4 tablets in the morning and 4 in the evening along with food.

BacoZest® 150mg

(Bacopa monnieri extract)

Cordcypes 140mg

title: LABO Nutrition NeuroREGAIN - Plasmalogens For Brain Memory, Mental Clarity & Cognitive Health Supplement • Made in Japan • 60 Veggie Caps
detail_text: NeuroREGAIN is a high potency brain health formula containing plasmalogen, naturally extracted from scallops. Intensive clinical studies have confirmed its positive results in supporting cognitive functions. These specific clinical trials (human studies) are conducted with NeuroREGAIN. As such, these clinical trials video footages are not applicable for any other scallop-derived plasmalogen supplements. Beware of other plasmalogen supplements that repost these videos from LABO Nutrition and claim identical effectiveness. NeuroREGAIN is the ONLY scallop-derived plasmalogen formula in the market with this specific mix of: 1. High purity scallop-derived plasmalogens 2. Patented extraction technology 3. Divided dosage (2 capsules) • Support memory & mental clarity • Support new brain cell formation • Delay brain deterioration • Suppress brain inflammation Studies have shown that plasmalogen levels are significantly reduced in the brain tissue and blood serum of patients with brain deterioration. The decline of plasmalogen is associated with the severity of cognitive impairment. Plasmalogen from scallop is found to have better and quicker effects than chicken-derived plasmalogens in the improvement of cognitive function. The unique extraction technology is developed by a research team led by Emeritus Professor, Takehiko Fujino of Kyushu University in Japan. Studies have shown that plasmalogen levels are significantly reduced in the brain tissue and blood serum of patients with brain deterioration. The decline of plasmalogen is associated with the severity of cognitive impairment. Direction of Use : General brain health maintenance: 1 capsule daily Individuals diagnosed with brain deterioration: 1 capsule in the morning; 1 capsule in the afternoon or night *Preferably taken on an empty stomach or 2 hours after meal. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Dosage is optimised at 2 capsules a day (taken separately). Taking more is not recommended. If necessary, capsule may be opened and mixed with water for ease of consumption. Do not use hot water. Content: 1 box contains 60 veggie caps (60 days’ supply) When should I start to take NeuroREGAIN for protection against brain deterioration? Brain deterioration begins 20 years before symptoms appear. Since brain deterioration typically develops in people aged 65 or older, it is highly advisable to take NeuroREGAIN from age 45 to replenish the reduced plasmalogens in the brain as a protection against deterioration of cognitive functions. If I eat plenty of scallops, can I achieve the same level of effect on cognitive function? NeuroREGAIN is formulated with scallop-derived plasmalogens extracted with a special technique so that it can be absorbed efficiently into our body. It is not possible to achieve the same absorption efficiency with consumption of plenty of scallops. Active Ingredients in 2 veggie caps: 1000μg(1mg) Plasmalogen (extracted from scallop) Caution: This product is extracted from scallop and is manufactured in a GMP facility that also processes soybean. Please consult your physician if you are allergic to scallop or soybean. Country of Origin: Made in Japan Gluten-Free, Non-GMO, GMO Certified Disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease. If you are pregnant, nursing, or taking any medication, please consult your physician before consuming any supplements.

NeuroREGAIN is a high potency brain health formula containing plasmalogen, naturally extracted from scallops. Intensive clinical studies have confirmed its positive results in supporting cognitive functions.

These specific clinical trials (human studies) are conducted with NeuroREGAIN. As such, these clinical trials video footages are not applicable for any other scallop-derived plasmalogen supplements.

Beware of other plasmalogen supplements that repost these videos from LABO Nutrition and claim identical effectiveness.

NeuroREGAIN is the ONLY scallop-derived plasmalogen formula in the market with this specific mix of:

1. High purity scallop-derived plasmalogens

2. Patented extraction technology

3. Divided dosage (2 capsules)

• Support memory & mental clarity

• Support new brain cell formation

• Delay brain deterioration

• Suppress brain inflammation

Studies have shown that plasmalogen levels are significantly reduced in the brain tissue and blood serum of patients with brain deterioration. The decline of plasmalogen is associated with the severity of cognitive impairment.

Plasmalogen from scallop is found to have better and quicker effects than chicken-derived plasmalogens in the improvement of cognitive function. The unique extraction technology is developed by a research team led by Emeritus Professor, Takehiko Fujino of Kyushu University in Japan.

Studies have shown that plasmalogen levels are significantly reduced in the brain tissue and blood serum of patients with brain deterioration. The decline of plasmalogen is associated with the severity of cognitive impairment.

Direction of Use:

General brain health maintenance:

1 capsule daily

Individuals diagnosed with brain deterioration:

1 capsule in the morning; 1 capsule in the afternoon or night

*Preferably taken on an empty stomach or 2 hours after meal.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Dosage is optimised at 2 capsules a day (taken separately). Taking more is not recommended.

If necessary, capsule may be opened and mixed with water for ease of consumption. Do not use hot water.

Content:

1 box contains 60 veggie caps (60 days’ supply)

When should I start to take NeuroREGAIN for protection against brain deterioration?

Brain deterioration begins 20 years before symptoms appear. Since brain deterioration typically develops in people aged 65 or older, it is highly advisable to take NeuroREGAIN from age 45 to replenish the reduced plasmalogens in the brain as a protection against deterioration of cognitive functions.

If I eat plenty of scallops, can I achieve the same level of effect on cognitive function?

NeuroREGAIN is formulated with scallop-derived plasmalogens extracted with a special technique so that it can be absorbed efficiently into our body. It is not possible to achieve the same absorption efficiency with consumption of plenty of scallops.

Active Ingredients in 2 veggie caps:

1000μg(1mg) Plasmalogen (extracted from scallop)

Caution: This product is extracted from scallop and is manufactured in a GMP facility that also processes soybean. Please consult your physician if you are allergic to scallop or soybean.

title: Ginkgo biloba extract, improves memory and brain power, helps IQ growth, concentrates attention, supports cognitive ability, and nourishes the brain
detail_text: Extra Strength Formula: Provides 5000mg of Premium Ginkgo Biloba per serving (2 vegetarian capsules). This Ginkgo vitamin is standardized to contain 24% Ginkgo flavonoid glycosides (Ginkgo USP grade) and 6% terpene lactones. Ginkgo biloba is considered a nootropic plant because it has been used for thousands of years to naturally support cognitive functions such as memory, concentration, focus, and mental alertness. Boosts Energy + Alertness: Feeling Tired? Formulated with Ginkgo Biloba Extract to boost energy and alertness levels throughout the day. It helps the body feel energized throughout the day without feeling jittery, helping a person be more active and get work done. Ginkgo biloba is one of the most commonly used brain supplements to improve mental function. Combine it with bacopa monniera and B vitamins to boost blood flow, oxygen and nutrient absorption in the brain. Brain Function + Circulation: Ginkgo Biloba is a powerful botanical that has been shown to support healthy memory, focus and circulation. Ginkgo is said to help enhance blood flow and oxygen to the brain to support cognitive health. Our Ginkgo Biloba formula helps improve alertness, memory, problem solving, focus, cognitive performance and overall neuronal health while reducing brain fog and inattention. When the mind is active and in the right state, logical reasoning and creativity are enhanced. GREAT FOR BUSY PROFESSIONALS: Don't have time for anything complicated? Just 2 capsules per day, each serving contains Ginkgo Biloba Extract, Bacopa monniera, Centella Asiatica, Folic Acid and B Vitamins. Our Ginkgo formula contains all the key ingredients to help improve mental clarity, cognitive performance, memory and physical strength, support eye health, and combat work stress and anxiety. TESTED PURE & QUALITY: Pure, Gluten Free, Non-GMO, Third Party Lab Tested, Vegan. Free of pesticides, herbicides, fertilizers, fillers, yeast, sugar, soy, dairy, antibiotics and preservatives. We're proud to provide 100% safe supplements for you and your family. It is formulated and manufactured in an approved cGMP facility in the USA. Suggested use/how to use: As a dietary supplement, take 2 capsules daily, or as directed by a healthcare practitioner. Store in a cool, dry place. Do not expose to sunlight or moisture. Close the lid after opening.

page_json.description: Racepack. Cognitive Support. Supports Memory and Learning. Promotes Brain Health. Magnesium Mg is an essential mineral best known for its role in bone and nervous system function. Recent research has demonstrated that it is also critical for normal brain health and normal cognitive function by maintaining the density and stability of neuronal synapses. However, most forms of Mg are not easily absorbed into the nervous system. Magtein is a patented form of Mg that readily crosses the blood-brain barrier for utilization in the brain. Laboratory studies indicate that Magtein® supports brain health and may facilitate learning and memory, as well as a relaxed mood. Suggested use. Take 3 capsules daily in divided doses take 1 capsule in the morning and take 2 capsules two hours before sleep). Other ingredients. detail_html:
- 100% Authentic Products Only

- Imported from Australia

Swisse Ultiboost Memory + Focus supports focus, clarity, concentration and brain health. It also maintains energy levels and supports a health stress response.

 

BENEFITS

  • Supports a healthy stress response and promotes the body's adaptation to stress
  • Supports brain and cognitive function, and helps maintain memory and mental recall
  • Supports mental function, concentration, and focus
  • Assists with energy production to support physical and mental endurance, stamina, and vitality, and helps decrease mental fatigue and relieves tiredness

 

DIRECTIONS + WARNINGS

Adult Dosage:

One tablet twice daily. Take during or immediately after a meal, or as directed by a healthcare professional.

Teenage Dosage (Mental Function, Energy Production, Support During Stress):

One tablet daily. Take during or immediately after a meal, or as directed by a healthcare professional.

 

Warnings:

  • If symptoms persist consult your healthcare professional.
  • Vitamin supplements should not replace a balanced diet.
  • Do not take while on warfarin therapy without medical advice.
  • This medicine may not be right for you. Always read the label and any warnings before purchase. Follow the directions for use. If symptoms persist, talk to your health professional. Supplements may only be of assistance if dietary intake is inadequate.

 

Storage:

Store below 25°C. Do not use if cap seal is broken.

 

ALLERGEN INFORMATION

No added gluten, lactose, yeast, egg or artificial flavours. Suitable for vegetarians and vegans.

 

Each tablet contains:

  • Vitamin B1 (thiamine hydrochloride) 25 mg
  • Vitamin B2 (riboflavin) 35 mg
  • Nicotinamide 20 mg
  • Vitamin B5 (pantothenic acid from calcium pantothenate 70 mg) 64.13 mg
  • Vitamin B6 (pyridoxine from pyridoxine hydrochloride 25 mg) 20.56 mg
  • Vitamin B12 (cyanocobalamin) 25 micrograms
  • Brahmi (Bacopa monnieri extract 93.33 mg) equiv. dry herb (standardised to contain bacosides calculated as bacoside A 46.7 mg) 3.73 g (min.)
  • Ginkgo (Ginkgo biloba extract 60 mg) equiv. dry leaf (standardised to contain ginkgo flavonglycosides 14.4 mg, ginkgolides & bilobalide 3.6 mg) 3 g (min.)
